ItacPersonItem.Notes: Alberti was secretary of the Accademia di San Luca. See his biographical sketch by Alberto Asor Rosa in DBI. He was supposed to deliver the following presentation at on the of the meetings of the Academy: "che sia, et s`intenda la forza del rilievo nella pittura, e di quanta sustanza sia, e quali maestri passati siano stati più singolari in questo particolare".
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
